data.title: Andreessen Horowitz champions blockchain integration for AI ownership and innovation
data.description:
Andreessen Horowitz’s crypto arm a16z said blockchains could steer artificial intelligence toward user ownership and open standards, according to a June 11 report. The paper argued that core context and “agent passports” should reside in self-custodial wallets, providing any large-language-model interface with instant access to preferences without requiring repeated training.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/andreessen-horowitz-champions-blockchain-integration-for-ai-ownership-and-innovation/

data.title: Ethereum Futures Open Interest Hits Record $41 Billion, Surpassing Bitcoin
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) futures open interest (OI) hit a record high (ATH) of $41 billion, overtaking Bitcoin ($BTC). This increase in open interest indicates traders’ confidence among investors and an increased interest in Ethereum, which suggests a possible bullish trend in the future.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/12/ethereum-futures-open-interest-hits-record-41-billion-surpassing-bitcoin/
